hero.title: I build scalable backend systems and web platforms for enterprise-grade applications.
hero.description: From microservices architecture to real-time dashboards, I help teams deliver robust, maintainable software with clean design and measurable impact.

items.teams: Enterprise platforms led as tech lead

whatIDo.title: Building robust backends and full stack products that scale.
whatIDo.subtitle: A disciplined approach from architecture to deployment.

performance.title: Backend Architecture
performance.body: I design scalable microservices and REST APIs using NestJS, Spring Boot and Node.js — with async messaging, SOLID principles, and clean architecture for long-term maintainability.

ux.title: Full Stack Development
ux.body: I build complete products end-to-end: backend APIs, web interfaces with React and Next.js, and mobile apps with Flutter — covering the full lifecycle from database schema to UI.

architecture.title: Cloud & Integration
architecture.body: I deploy services on AWS, Railway and Docker, integrate payment gateways, and connect complex systems with event-driven patterns and RabbitMQ for reliable async processing.

featuredCaseStudy.title: Enterprise E-Billing Platform Migration
featuredCaseStudy.subtitle: Leading the backend team through a microservices redesign of a mission-critical billing system.

problem.title: Problem
problem.body: A high-demand enterprise billing platform was struggling with a monolithic architecture that made scaling, maintenance, and new feature delivery slow and risky.

solution.title: Solution
solution.body: I led the backend team and designed a microservices architecture with RabbitMQ for async event processing, applying SOLID principles and event-driven patterns to decouple the core billing modules.

result.title: Result
result.body: The platform gained improved modularity, better fault isolation, faster deployment cycles for billing rules, and secure payment gateway integrations with risk analysis.

projects.title: Featured projects
projects.subtitle: A collection of backend, full stack, and mobile work.
projects.pageSubtitle: A collection of work across backend systems, web platforms, and mobile apps.

projectDetail.translateSolution: Translate constraints into a scalable solution

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Full stack engineer building enterprise systems and web platforms from Tunja, Colombia.
about.paragraph1: I'm a Full Stack Software Engineer with 5+ years of experience delivering production-grade web platforms and enterprise systems. I specialize in backend architecture and microservices, with strong skills across the full stack — from REST APIs and databases to React, Next.js, and Flutter mobile apps.
about.paragraph2: I've led backend teams for enterprise-scale electronic billing systems, designed microservices and event-driven architectures, integrated payment gateways, and shipped real-time dashboards and mobile apps to Google Play. I enjoy working close to the business logic and am comfortable in both leadership and hands-on engineering roles.
about.paragraph3: I'm self-driven and passionate about continuous learning — including AI-assisted development workflows. I speak Spanish natively, English at C1 level, and have working knowledge of Portuguese and French. I'm always open to new challenges and meaningful collaborations.

contact.title: Get in touch
contact.subtitle: Have a project in mind? Let's talk.
contact.cta: I'm open to new opportunities and interesting technical challenges. Drop me a line and I'll get back to you.
contact.pageSubtitle: Have a project in mind or want to collaborate? Write me.
contact.formIntro: The best way to reach me is by email. I typically respond within a couple of days.
